articleTitle: Wile E. Coyote's Grand Canyon Blaster
introSection:
Wile E. Coyote's Grand Canyon Blaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Texas in Arlington, Texas, USA. It opened on March 10, 2001 and is located in the Looney Tunes-themed section in the park.

The ride is a Big Dipper model from Chance Rides.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Faded red track and faded orange supports.

fullText:
Wile E. Coyote's Grand Canyon Blaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Texas in Arlington, Texas, USA. It opened on March 10, 2001 and is located in the Looney Tunes-themed section in the park.

The ride is a Big Dipper model from Chance Rides.



Faded red track and faded orange supports.
